blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 13 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.4" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
